name: execute scope coder response prompt

args.verificationHint: Run the focused regression tests before replying.

openFindings.requiredAction: Either rename it now or defer with rationale.

contains: The currently open review findings below are non-blocking. Decide whether to address each one now or explicitly reject/defer it with rationale.
If you choose to address any findings, make the smallest justified code changes
A derived plan must use the same Neal-executable contract as a top-level plan.
excludes: Do not start a new top-level plan
